reviews.review_description: probably the most disappointing game I've played simply because I think it could be great but there's just not much there currently. if they add some upgrade systems and structure it could be one of the better MR games out there.

reviews.review_title: Won't open portal to start game.
reviews.review_description: No way to open the portal to actually play.

I'm actually liking this version, just a few tweaks needed but understandably it's still in progress, the aiming is a bit off and the Lazer turret is random sometimes but when upgraded is a beast, a few people already mentioned bots going behind walls and surprising you with shots but hopefully that will be look at also, the rifle is my love/hate when upgraded it's dangerous but from the beginning annoying as hell, graphics is good the immersive feel you get is great, I do recommend this game addictive fun if this was multiplayer or somehow co-op this would be amazing!
Booo

Bots are behind my room walls and shooting me.  Room rescan didn't helps. I can't play likee this.
Once I had portal in front and a window behind me. The bots surrounded me.  Weird things.
It is so fun

With small tweaks this game will do great. 

1. Gun cooldown will ruin your experience around the 7th or 8th wave. You simple can't kill anything fast enough. Regardless of what upgrades you get. I haven't made it past wave 9 or 10. There's to many enemies, not enough dmg and the gun CD time will make you lose. Every time.

2. Turrets....idk if it's just me but not being able to toss my turrets even just a few feet away is crazy annoying. 

3. Gun swapping. I get it. 1 Gun that can transform into others is cool.....but when you couple the time it takes to transform from one mode to the next AND super long cooldowns AND low damage.....its almost not worth it to switch. Having your sword on your hip or shotgun over the shoulder is infinitely a better idea.

4. Tracking/accuracy seems SUPER OFF. I get there's simulated spray so not all your bullets fly straight but there's virtually NO REASON AT ALL to aim down sights. ESPECIALLY with the sniper. Your best bet is do a random shot and hope it hits. And adjust accordingly. Sniper shot if anything should be the most accurate and it just isn't albeit strong. 

5. Why. WHY TF is the shotgun a pump action? Trying to reload it is so clunky and awkward.....swap to a auto shotty with 6 or 8 shots and then put it on cooldown to auto reload. The pump reload is 100% trash.

Lastly....... give people some kind of tutorial. Let people know they have to suck up the gold cubes tov level up. Should we be right up on the portal or 10ft back? Does dodging actually help? Is there another way to get health? Do the different turrets do more or less damage? 

Like you HAVE to give us a bit more info than open portal and figure it out.

This game has so much potential. Honestly tower defense shooters like this are GOLD if done right. Now clean this up and Do it right! It's so close to being great. Even at the clunky stage it is now.
Pls add multiplayer with other vr head sets at the same place with you it would make the game 10× better

reviews.review_title: I rated 5 stars so you could see this..
reviews.review_description: THEY’RE IN THE WALLS and i cannot do nothing about it

The game is great, but I can't play it anymore because when I start the game and it says open the portal I am directly in the middle of the world
 without a portal no way to starr the actual game. Please help.

It’s a good game but can you make it so you receive backup.  Since  enemy troops are coming at you fast make it so you receive.    Troops from like drop ships to cover you  and can move forward on the map. This should only happen if you have made it to wave 10. Or higher and if you have half of your health. That’s just feedback hope you add my ideas. And one more thing don’t just respond to. Reviews that say things aren’t working and also  respond to reviews  that have good ratings so people know they were read.
Seems to be common occurrence but no portal and just stuck at beginning. Uninstalled and reinstalled and nothing
This game looks like fun but nothing happens

reviews.review_title: Neat little game. No lefty mode.
reviews.review_description: The game itself is fine, kinda basic but still an enjoyable first step into mixed reality. However it lacks a left handed mode and forces you to shoot right handed.
The portal is not working

developer_response.body: Hi, you might need to go into your settings > physical space > space setup and "setup" your space again or "clear" the older spaces and let the game prompts help you create a new space setup. Hopefully this helps or please join us on our discord and we can assist further.

reviews.review_description: I cannot open a portal in game at all.

developer_response.body: Hi, you might need to go into your settings > physical space > space setup and "setup" your space again or "clear" the older spaces and let the game prompts help you create a new space setup. Hopefully this helps or please join us on our discord and we can assist further.

reviews.review_description:
It's actually pretty fun, can't wait to see where they go with it.

Couple of things to improve:
1) Top of the list is furniture. One wall I have a poster mapped and it actually blocks the bullets. That was really annoying.
2) Weapons. They are cool but the blade seems to have tracking issues and the sniper rifle aim seems off.
3) Turrets. More Turrets and it would be cool if you could attach them to your walls and ceiling, just think that would look cool.

Definitely going to buy it when it's finished!
For a free game this is a decent game. I had no issues with it and had fun.

reviews.review_title: Lots of fun , even in limited space!
reviews.review_description:
I didn't expect much and I was greatly surprised. Fun to play. It's a comfortable playing atmosphere. If I had a complaint,  it would be to say, it would be great to be able to choose what hand you have the blaster in, instead of defaulting to the right hand.
Overall,  I love it!
I love this game so much. It's easy to get started, but definitely a challenge.  Enjoy  😉 😉
